title: Minimalist Bundles
body:
![Preview 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UIrb50DF/images/9bc3605284c8a2e1633f11c2798abdabe5ae2890.png)

Replaces all the bundles (Except for default one obviously) with default-like texture with colored string!

For all the brown bundle fans - I appologize for this monstrosity of a texture. I really tried to make it work, but brown string on a brown bundle just blends. If you want to, you can just delete the brown bundle textures (3), and get the old one back!

**You don't need anything to make it work!**
